actual_current_surface_status: exact-support / additive-top subtraction row contract; current additive Jacobian rows are bounded support only, while W/Z rows, matched covariance, strict g2, and accepted action remain absent

additive_top_jacobian_row_status.status: bounded-support / additive-top coarse Jacobian rows from packaged three-mass top scans; strict subtraction closure still open

conditional_surface_status: If same-surface rows measure the independent additive top slope and matched covariance, the corrected response ratio identifies the radial-spurion y_t without setting the additive component to zero.

forbidden_shortcuts: estimating A_top from observed y_t or observed m_t
using marginal top and W rows without matched covariance
using H_unit, yt_ward_identity, alpha_LM, plaquette/u0, or unit-normalization shortcuts
measured_rows_required: T_total = dE_top/ds under the mixed current-source coordinate
A_top = independent additive top slope under the same coordinate convention
W = dM_W/ds or Z = dM_Z/ds under the same source shifts
matched covariance for T_total, A_top, W/Z, and g2 or sqrt(g2^2+gY^2)

source_coordinates.s_additive: moves only the independent additive top scalar source
source_coordinates.s_radial: moves the canonical Higgs radial branch v(s)

exact_next_action: Choose between two positive repairs: either build a replacement no-independent-top-source radial-spurion action, or produce same-ensemble additive-top Jacobian rows plus W/Z response rows and matched covariance for the subtraction contract.

parent_statuses.additive_source_radial_spurion_incompati: exact support/boundary / current additive source is incompatible with accepted radial-spurion action closure
parent_statuses.campaign_status: open / active campaign continuing after current shortcut blocks
parent_statuses.electroweak_g2_builder: open / electroweak g2 certificate builder inputs absent
parent_statuses.radial_spurion_action_contract: exact-support / no-independent-top-source radial-spurion action contract; current additive-source action not adopted
parent_statuses.retained_route: open / retained closure not yet reached
parent_statuses.same_source_top_response_builder: open / same-source top-response identity or covariance inputs absent
parent_statuses.top_wz_matched_covariance_builder: open / matched top-W response rows absent
parent_statuses.wz_g2_authority_firewall: exact negative boundary / WZ response g2 authority absent for PR230
parent_statuses.wz_mass_fit_response_row_builder: open / WZ mass-fit response-row builder inputs absent
parent_statuses.wz_response_ratio_identifiability_contra: exact-support / WZ response-ratio identifiability contract; current response rows, matched covariance, strict g2, and accepted same-source action are absent

proposal_allowed_reason: The subtraction formula is exact support only.  The current PR230 surface has bounded coarse additive-top Jacobian rows, but still lacks strict per-configuration additive rows, W/Z response rows, matched covariance, strict non-observed g2, and accepted radial-spurion action authority.
strict_non_claims: does not claim retained or proposed_retained y_t closure
does not set the independent additive top slope to zero
does not use observed y_t, observed top mass, observed W/Z masses, or observed g2
does not use H_unit, yt_ward_identity, alpha_LM, plaquette, u0, or unit-normalization shortcuts
does not infer matched covariance from marginal row errors
does not touch the live chunk worker
